description: Per-ticker dollar trading simulation. $1,000 initial cash per ticker ($10,000 total). BUY = invest $1,000 at Adj_Close (only if flat). SELL = sell all shares at Adj_Close (only if long). HOLD = no action. Open positions liquidated at final test date. P&L booked only on sell/liquidation. Test period: 2023-07-03 to 2024-12-23.
